series_metadata.series_description: Records created as the result of a hearing conducted pursuant to ORC Sections 4303.26 and .271, allowing legislaative authorities and certain institutions to object to the issuance of liquor permits, including all notes (which may or may not include video or audio tapes of the hearing), reports, summaries, recommendations, and exhibits presented at the hearing. (fna PM-213)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: The paper notes, reports and summaries, and recommendations are retained for 1 year after final disposition of the hearing matter; then the reports and summaries are scanned to the files. The paper notes and recommendations are destroyed at that time. The tapes are erased and reused 1 yeasr after the hearing is held. Exhibits are destroyed at the time the documents are scanned. ; Electronic: The hearing reports and summaries are electronically scanned to the Division''s LITS system and permanently retained., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Permanent
